emails.subject: Re: Click Paper Approvals, 03-14-01
emails.body: Tana- I'm not sure. We definitely received an approval on Lyke Corporation (dba Ripon Printers) but I'm not sure if that was sent to you on a different list as well. Daishowa and Cariboo have since been killed. That may be why we missed this one counterparty. But I suppose it's possible we missed that list entirely. Either way, that one counterparty, The Record Herald, is the only one I show left in a legal reviewing status. Thanks, Nikki From: Tana Jones@ECT on 03/28/2001 09:39 AM
